name: inkborne
description: Inkborne scaffold: Roll20 + D&D Beyond mechanics with AI GM placeholders

scripts.check: for f in $(rg --files -g '*.js' -g '*.mjs' src server tests scripts); do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run unit
scripts.test: npm run verify && npm run smoke
scripts.test:full: npm run verify && npm run smoke && npm run smoke:ai && npm run e2e
